description:
Complete a full new-patient intake for a chronic disease transfer patient in FreeMED (http://localhost/freemed/, login: admin / admin).

Register patient Elena Vasquez-Moreno (DOB: April 23, 1966, Female, 457 Beacon Street Apt 3B, Boston, MA 02116, phone: 617-555-8294).

Add insurance company 'Northeastern Health Partners' to the system (101 Huntington Avenue, Boston, MA 02199, phone: 800-262-2583). Then add insurance coverage for Elena under this insurer: group number GRP-44821, policy number NHP-998-7721, effective date January 1, 2024.

Add two diagnoses to the problem list: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (ICD-9 250.00, onset 2015-03-10) and Essential Hypertension (ICD-9 401.9, onset 2018-07-22).

Record a drug allergy: ACE Inhibitors causing angioedema, severity severe.

Prescribe Losartan 50mg (quantity 30, 5 refills, '1 tablet daily') — this ARB is used because the patient cannot tolerate ACE inhibitors.

Record vital signs: BP 152/94, heart rate 84, temperature 98.6 F, weight 178 lbs, height 64 inches.

Create a referral to Dr. Anita Patel, Endocrinology, for diabetes management. Reason: newly established patient with uncontrolled Type 2 Diabetes requiring specialist evaluation. Referral date: April 1, 2025.

Write a clinical progress note documenting: both diagnoses, the ACE inhibitor allergy and why Losartan was chosen, elevated blood pressure, the endocrinology referral, and a plan to order HbA1c and lipid panel.

Schedule a 30-minute follow-up for July 15, 2025 at 2:00 PM.
